response.justification: The candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript/Node.js/React, hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling development, and a strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development). Cloud and containerization experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) and database experience (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL) align well. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js experience and limited evidence of Kotlin or Python, but the demonstrated multi-language adaptability (D, Java, C++, Swift, PHP) suggests these are quickly learnable.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience with recent AI agent and MCP infrastructure work
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, built test frameworks, taught testing workshops
Broad polyglot background with cloud, Docker, and Kubernetes deployment experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python proficiency not evidenced despite being listed as required languages
Frontend framework depth leans on Ember.js historically; React exposure is more recent and less detailed
